texto: One of my earliest memories is my father telling me to behave because I'm about to meet and work with the greatest actor of all time. Then this old guy comes out and I was like, 'Pfff, he doesn't look anything like Luke Skywalker, I don't know what my dad is trying to tell me here.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sean Maguire: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “One of my earliest memories is my father telling me to behave because I'm about to meet and work …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, work, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e time.

frase_original: One of my earliest memories is my father telling me to behave because I'm about to meet and work with the greatest actor of all time. Then this old guy comes out and I was like, 'Pfff, he doesn't look anything like Luke Skywalker, I don't know what my dad is trying to tell me here.'
